notes: Solid, near-complete Pong implementation with angle-based paddle bouncing, speed escalation, win detection, and proper game states; minor issue is ball hidden on START screen and serve direction logic is slightly inverted (serves toward scorer rather than loser).
An exceptionally well-made Pong clone with proper paddle collision math, speed scaling, and game states, missing only an e.repeat check on the pause key to prevent rapid toggling.

A solid and mostly complete Pong clone, but it has minor gameplay/logic roughness like the ball being hidden on the start screen and some simplistic collision/scoring behavior that keeps it short of excellent.
